query:
-- Sample of mismatched services - show the discrepancy
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue as storedRevenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) as billingItemSum,
  s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) as discrepancy
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.customerName, s.monthlyRevenue
HAVING ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)) > 0.01
ORDER BY ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)) DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- Sample of mismatched services - show the discrepancy
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue as storedRevenue,
  COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) as billingItemSum,
  s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0) as discrepancy
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
  AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
GROUP BY s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.customerName, s.monthlyRevenue
HAVING ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)) > 0.01
ORDER BY ABS(s.monthlyRevenue - COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)) DESC
LIMIT 15;
